hero.title: Where do you live online?
hero.subtitle: We'll read your homepage and set everything else up for you to confirm.

field.label: Domain
field.help: Your data stays in your workspace.

promise.label: We'll find
promise.aria: We'll find your brand, competitors, prompts, and citations from your homepage.

review.heroSubtitle: Pre-filled from <host>{hostName}</host>. Edit anything that looks off.
review.heroSubtitleNoEngine: Pre-filled your brand from <host>{hostName}</host>. Add a few competitors and prompts and you're tracking.
review.heroSubtitleNoEngineNoHost: We've pre-filled your brand. Add a few competitors and prompts and you're tracking.

failedNotice.body: Fill in your brand, competitors, and prompts below — we'll start tracking once you confirm.

regenerate.tooltip: Run a fresh suggestion for this domain
regenerate.confirmTitle: Replace your edits with a fresh suggestion?
regenerate.rateLimited: You've hit today's regeneration limit. Edit the fields below manually.
regenerate.error: Couldn't start a fresh suggestion. Please try again.

brand.title: Your brand
brand.description: Edit the name and aliases if needed.
brand.aliasesHelperEmpty: Other names people use for {brand} — e.g. legal name or short form. Optional.
brand.aliasesHelperEmptyNoBrand: Other names people use for your brand. Optional.
brand.aliasesHelperFromExtraction: We pulled these from the site. Edit or add more.
brand.aliasesHelperFromAi: Suggestions from AI — confirm or edit before continuing.

competitors.title: Suggested competitors
competitors.description: Uncheck any that don't fit. You can add more.
competitors.descriptionManual: Brands you'd like to track alongside {brand}. Add 3–5 to start.
competitors.descriptionManualNoBrand: Brands you'd like to track alongside your own. Add 3–5 to start.
competitors.summary: {count, plural, one {# competitor found} other {# competitors found}}

prompts.title: Suggested prompts
prompts.description: We'll run these queries against AI engines to see who they mention.
prompts.usingStarter: Use the Quaynt starter set instead
prompts.summary: {count, plural, one {# prompt drafted} other {# prompts drafted}}
prompts.newPromptPlaceholder: Type a prompt and press Enter
prompts.emptyState: No prompts yet — add one below.

loading.suggesting: Analysing your brand and drafting prompts…
loading.elapsedHint: Still working — analysis takes a few seconds for complex sites.

cta.disabled: Add a brand name to continue

errors.fetchFailed: We couldn't reach your site. Check the domain or fill in your brand details below.
errors.robotsDisallow: Your site's robots.txt asks bots not to fetch it. Fill in your brand details below.
errors.engineUnavailable: Our suggestion engine is temporarily unavailable. Fill in the details below.
errors.engineRateLimited: Too many suggestion requests right now. Fill in the details below.
errors.engineResponseInvalid: Suggestion engine returned an unusable response. Fill in the details below.
errors.timeout: The lookup took too long. Try again or fill in the details below.
errors.noAdapter: Connect a model adapter to start tracking your brand.
errors.runFailed: We couldn't start your first run. Open the model runs page to retry.

persona.title: Tailor your dashboard.
persona.subtitle: Optional — helps us recommend the right next steps.

checklist.title: Get set up
checklist.celebration: All set up — your AI visibility insights are ready.

setup.label: Confirm your setup
setup.description: Brand, competitors, and prompts in one screen.

firstRun.label: Run your first check
firstRun.description: Trigger an AI visibility run across your engines.

results.label: View your first results
results.description: Wait 2–5 minutes for your run to complete.

firstRun.title: Your first AI visibility report is computing
firstRun.subtitle: We're checking how the major AI engines see your brand right now.
firstRun.progress: {done, plural, one {# prompt complete} other {# prompts complete}} of {total}

share.title: Recommendation share
share.description: How often AI engines surface your brand for the prompts that matter.
share.empty: We didn't find any third-party citations in this first run.

count.title: Earned citations
count.description: Mentions on third-party sources cited by AI engines.

sentiment.title: Sentiment
sentiment.description: How positively the surrounding context describes your brand.
sentiment.empty: Not enough data to score sentiment yet.

prompts.title: Prompts we're asking
prompts.summary: {count, plural, one {# prompt} other {# prompts}} running across {engines, plural, one {# engine} other {# engines}}

completed.title: Your first run is ready
completed.body: Open your dashboard to see the full picture.

partial.title: Your first run finished partially
partial.body: Some engines didn't return results. You can still review what we found.

failed.title: Your first run didn't finish
failed.body: We couldn't complete the run. Check your engine credentials and try again.

cancelled.title: This run was cancelled
cancelled.body: The run was cancelled before it could finish. Start a new one when you're ready.

noCitations.title: No third-party citations yet
noCitations.body: This first run didn't surface any earned citations. That's normal for newer brands — try expanding your prompt set or competitors and run again.

wow.title: You're cited in {platform}!
wow.subtitle: Here's the first time we caught an AI engine mentioning a third-party source about your brand.
wow.noSnippet: (No surrounding context returned by the engine.)

kpis.title: Your headline numbers
kpis.body: Recommendation share, earned citations, and average sentiment — at a glance, with deltas.

opportunities.title: Where to act next
opportunities.body: Specific gaps and wins ranked by impact.

alerts.title: What's changed
alerts.body: Notable shifts in your visibility, like a new competitor surging or a sudden sentiment drop.

brands.title: Manage brands
brands.body: Add aliases, swap competitors, or branch into a sub-brand.

settings.title: Engines and settings
settings.body: Connect engines, manage members, and tune your workspace.

help.title: Replay this tour anytime
help.body: The Help menu lives here — replay the tour, jump back into onboarding, or get support.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save your progress. Please try again.
